name: Global Partners LP 9.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units representing limited partner interests
summary: Global Partners LP 9.75% Series A Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Units representing limited partner interests represents a preferred equity security issued by Global Partners LP. These units pay a fixed dividend rate that may convert to a floating rate in the future and have no maturity date, although they may be redeemed by the issuer. Global Partners LP is a midstream logistics and marketing company that focuses on the distribution of petroleum products and renewable fuels.
